"HOW TO USE SKITTLE-CHAN"

"**MESSAGE**
To use `@skittle-chan#6900`, simply send a message in a supported channel.
If the channel supports `@skittle-chan#6900`, the bot will respond automatically.

**COMMANDS**
- Use `/login` to log in to `@skittle-chan` and access additional commands, like `/nudes`.
- Use `/profile` to view your profile or log out of `@skittle-chan`.

Type `/` (not send) to see all available commands.

**MAINTENANCE**
Occasionally, `@skittle-chan#6900` will undergo maintenance, which can last anywhere from 2 hours to 14 days.
The bot will officially launch on `1.1.2025`. All official maintenance announcements will be posted in the <#1300813527140925471> channel.

Thank you to everyone who has joined! "

"pink"
